name: Rosaria
desc: Kilisede bir rahibe olduğunu belli eden tek şey kıyafetleri. Keskin sözleri ve soğuk tavırları vardır. Her zaman tek başına hareket eder.

list.imgDesc:
Orijinal Kıyafet - İnfazcının Dikenleri

Rosaria'nın giysisi. Rosaria bu özel Favonius Kilisesi üniformasını kendine uyarladı.

Alınan Kıyafet #1 - Kilisenin Özgür Ruhu

Rosaria'nın giysisi. Anlaşılan Kilise bunu onun için özel olarak üretmiş.

"Hadi ama! Bunu senin için aldılar!"

Rosaria biraz şüpheli, biraz da rahatsız dursa da Barbara güzelce sarılmış hediye kutusunu neşeyle ona verdi.

Paketi yırtan Rosaria, kutunun üstünde bir not buldu. Nottaki güzel el yazısı müzik gibi akıp gidiyordu.

"Sevgili Rahibe Rosaria, Bayan Barbara'dan sana bu hediyeyi vermesini istedik ama lütfen hediyeyi seni göremeyeceği bir yerde aç."

Rosaria arkasını dönerek kutuyu açtı. İçinde bir not daha vardı. El yazısı yine aynı kişiye aitti.

"Sevgili Rahibe Rosaria, çok fazla kişinin senin doğum gününü bilmesini istemediğini biliyoruz. Biz doğum gününü Büyük Usta Varka'nın yazdığı öz geçmişinden öğrendik. Bu nedenle izin ver, Favonius Kilisesi olarak sana bu önemli günde, senin için özel yapılmış yeni bir üniforma gönderelim."

"Senin için de sorun olmazsa lütfen bu kadar soğuk davranmayı bırak da bir kez olsun normal bir Rahibe ol."

Rahibe Dahlia (Bu mektup Rahibe Victoria'nın isteğiyle yazılmıştır.)

list.desc:
Normal Saldırı
Arka arkaya en fazla 5 mızrak saldırısı yapar.

Yüklü Saldırı
İleri atılırken belirli miktarda Dayanıklılık harcar ve önündeki düşmanlara zarar verir.

Havadan Saldırı
Havadayken dalışa geçerek yere vurur ve yoluna çıkan düşmanlara Alan Hasarı verir.
list.title: Normal Saldırı: Kilisenin Mızrağı

list.desc:
Rosaria, hızla yer değiştirerek düşmanının arkasında belirir. Mızrağını düşmanına saplayıp savurarak Buz Hasarı verir.

Günahlarını Rahibe Rosaria'ya anlatanlar bağışlanmaz. Günahları ne kadar büyükse cezaları da bir o kadar sert ve dondurucu olur.
list.title: Hiddetli İtiraf

list.desc:
Rosaria, bu eşsiz dua ayininde önce silahını savurarak etrafındaki düşmanlara saldırır. Sonra yere dondurucu bir Buz Mızrağı indirir. İki saldırı da Buz Hasarı verir.
Buz Mızrağı etkinken soğuk hava dalgaları yayarak etrafındaki düşmanlara Buz Hasarı verir.


Yargı dağıtmak çok zor bir iştir. O aşamayı geçip direkt son söze gelmek çok daha kolaydır. Rosaria zaten hiçbir zaman Rüzgar Tanrısı'na düşkün değildi. Bu nedenle ayinler de kısa ve kolaydı.
list.title: Son Ayin

list.desc: Hiddetli İtiraf becerisini kullanarak bir düşmana arkadan vurduğunda 5 saniyeliğine Rosaria'nın Kritik Oranı %12 artar.
list.title: İtirafın Gölgesi

list.desc:
Son Ayin becerisi kullanıldığında 10 saniyeliğine yakındaki tüm grup üyelerinin (Rosaria hariç) Kritik Oranı, Rosaria'nın Kritik Oranının %15i kadar artar.

Bu şekilde kazanılan Kritik Oran Bonusu %15i geçemez.
list.title: Gölgelerin Merhameti

list.desc:
Geceleri (18:00-06:00) kendi grup üyelerinin hareket hızını %10 artırır.

Zindanlarda, Ezici Zindanlarda veya Hiçlik Sarmalında etkili değildir. Aynı etkiyi veren Pasif Yeteneklerle birikmez.
list.title: Gece Yolculuğu

list.desc: Rosaria bir Kritik Vuruş yaptığında 4 saniyeliğine Saldırı Hızı ve Normal Saldırı Hasarı %10 artar.
list.name: Habis Vahiy

list.desc: Son Ayin becerisinin oluşturduğu Buz Mızrağının süresi 4 saniye artar.
list.name: Umutsuz Topraklar

list.desc:
Hiddetli İtiraf Seviyesini 3 artırır.
Maksimum yükseltme seviyesi 15'tir.
list.name: Günahın Bedeli

list.desc:
Hiddetli İtiraf becerisinin Kritik Vuruşları Rosaria için 5 Enerji yeniler.

Hiddetli İtiraf her kullanıldığında yalnızca bir defa tetiklenebilir.
list.name: Acı Dolu Zarafet

list.desc:
Son Ayin Seviyesini 3 artırır.
Maksimum yükseltme seviyesi 15'tir.
list.name: Son Dua

list.desc: Son Ayin saldırısı, 10 saniyeliğine düşmanların Fiziksel Direncini %20 azaltır.
list.name: İlahi Ceza

list.desc:
Rosaria is one of the sisters of Mondstadt's Church of Favonius.
Though she is just as much a woman of the cloth as the likes of Barbara and Jilliana, people tend to make a mental distinction between Rosaria and other members of the clergy.
While she might dress the part — at least, to a certain extent — her speech and actions do not reflect her office in the slightest.
Furthermore, she displays even less reverence towards the gods than the ordinary citizens, and she routinely skips her various church engagements.
She comes, goes, and acts in solitude, and if she were ever to make an appearance in the Cathedral, it would be to smoke in the rearmost pew.
Such a lone wolf is Rosaria that perhaps she should be considered a clergywoman in name only.
list.title: Character Details

list.desc:
If Rosaria has been lectured once, she has been lectured a thousand times before concerning her unorthodox behavior.
For some reason, however, she has never faced any serious consequences for her transgressions. She does not work together with her church colleagues and only rarely shows up to celebratory events in the city.
The strange and mysterious Rosaria moves about almost like a wisp of black smoke — blink, and you'll miss her as she disappears into thin air.
Her social interactions are never more than superficial, and the rest of the time she keeps herself to herself.
However, Sister Victoria would say that the ever good-natured Barbara is one person who has always made the effort to get close to Rosaria.
"Please don't smoke in the Cathedral..." "Could you try to attend the ceremony on time next time...?"
"And... Hey, come back, I'm still talking to you!"
Barbara is forever anxiously chasing after Rosaria, urging her to complete her various daily tasks.
Yet even when faced with Barbara, the beloved idol of Mondstadt, Rosaria remains completely unmoved.
Surely her heart can't be completely made of stone?
list.title: Character Story 1

list.desc:
Rosaria's movements are unpredictable. She often leaves without notifying anyone and can be gone for up to several days on end.
During these times, none of her church colleagues know where to find her.
One of the sisters who took it upon herself to observe Rosaria once groused that "even a stray cat should at least give you notice before running off..."
Rosaria uses these disappearances to do work that only she can do in corners unseen by others.
An unfamiliar merchant, a suspicious traveler — are these people threats to Mondstadt?
She investigates, shadows, and if necessary, interrogates.
If they must disappear, then Rosaria shall be the last person they meet.
Such dark work, which cannot see the light of day, is to be done by her hand alone.
She always sets out after the sun has set, finishing her work in one fell swoop. Sometimes, if she makes it back by the crack of dawn, she gets to usher in the day ahead with a glass of breakfast wine.
The people of Mondstadt live in the golden sunlight, but Rosaria dwells under the silver moonlight.
It is a cold, piercing light... just like that of the ice she forms with her Cryo abilities.
"There are some things that young people need not know," Rosaria thinks.
Though, in her eyes, "young people" means all citizens of Mondstadt who live in the light of the sun, regardless of their age.
list.title: Character Story 2

list.desc:
Like a puff of smoke, the lackadaisical Rosaria is impossible to pin down.
Nevertheless, once she takes on a job, she can be relied on to handle it with the utmost professionalism.
"Lazy" is the last word that anyone would use to describe her ruthless interrogations of suspicious individuals.
She also possesses exceptional strength and knows the weaknesses of the human body like the back of her hand — and has no reservations about using this knowledge to kill.
People know her as the lazy, chain-smoking sister, but behind the scenes, she is a formidable purveyor of justice.
A strange fate for one who ostensibly basks in the light of the gods.
What led her to become a blood-soaked slayer? Why does she stay silent while others praise the gods for their protection?
Perhaps it should come as no surprise that Rosaria was not born and bred in Mondstadt.
"A city that is fortunate enough to be boring always needs someone to do the dirty work..."
Rosaria stubs her cigarette out as she speaks in her characteristically languid manner.
"And as far as I'm concerned, the things I deal with are far simpler than living the life of a traditional sister."
list.title: Character Story 3

list.desc:
Rosaria may not be one to attend prayer meetings, but that does not mean she doesn't have her own theological viewpoints.
In her view, freedom is the spiritual pillar of Mondstadt's people, and it is the very thing that caused her to end up here in the first place.
Rosaria was born in a remote mountain village, but was taken from her home shortly after birth by the very same bandits who drenched it in blood.
Raised by those crooks, she learned how to fight, sometimes thieving, other times doing odd jobs for the crew.
She was their servant, but also their tool, a crook, yet still a child.
She fought against outsiders and her comrades alike, and growing up was a constant battle for survival against the hunger and cold.
Rosaria's youth was just like Mondstadt's sunset — blood-red from horizon to horizon, and so fleeting that night had fallen before she'd had the chance to stop and take in the view.
Ultimately, the bandit crew was wiped out by the Knights of Favonius. As their youngest member, Rosaria was judged to have a chance of rehabilitation.
Grand Master Varka brought her to Mondstadt. Sincerely hoping that she might someday fit in here, he advised her:
"Go to the Cathedral and be cleansed by the light of our archon. You still have the chance to turn your fate around and live a normal life."
But Varka had not counted on Rosaria constantly skipping classes and dodging hymnal.
She would rather hunt in the wild than settle into a life of dutiful service as a sister. As far as she was concerned, the golden sunlight was not so much cleansing as blinding.
For Rosaria had long since come to understand that she was a child of the moonlight, and it was inevitable that she would someday return to the embrace of darkness.
list.title: Character Story 4

list.desc:
Rosaria, the Church's number one truant, became infamous for her absence very early on.
"Miss Rosaria, please, show a little more circumspection in your actions! You are a member of the Church. How is it appropriate that you simply never turn up for hymn practice?"
"Please calm down, Sister Ophila. Miss Rosaria, I'm told that you have never attended a single one of your compulsory classes. Is that so?"
"Yes."
"Mother Maria, please look at this... Rosaria's theological essay is an utter mess!"
"Miss Rosaria, if I may ask frankly... do you intend to do any work at all here at the Church?"
"No. I've already found other work."
Rosaria never showed so much as a hint of anxiety in any of these exchanges. What's more, it was true — she had indeed found other work for herself, and much darker work at that.
The unexpected twist was that she would ultimately end up doing this work under the aegis of the Church.
Rosaria the novice did not leave the clergy, but instead became Sister Rosaria without much incident.
Nevertheless, when she's not on a mission, she does everything she can to avoid attending church activities, instead heading to the taverns to drink or scaling the city walls to view the scenery.
And when she simply cannot escape a church engagement, you can be sure that she will be the first to leave.
The instant the workday is done, Rosaria vanishes.
Whether by bright day or dark night, there is one principle that she will never transgress: no overtime.
list.title: Character Story 5

list.desc:
A journal with a white cover. The words "Church of Favonius" are inscribed on the cover.
The handwriting is beautiful, but the content is the most of the most banal variety imaginable.
"Dandelion Wine — now eighty percent off!"
"Fisherman's Toast — an incredible flavor at an unbelievable price!"
"Crazy discounts on Wheat — ask at the counter and we'll grind it into Flour for you."
"Buy three Tomatoes and get one free!"
"Fresh Small Lamp Grass! Use it to light up your bathroom! Come on, Sir, have a look!"
There is something incongruous about a random assortment of marketplace cries and advertising slogans having been penned by such a graceful and elegant hand.
This journal is a relic from Rosaria's novice days.
Clearly, she must have skipped class and headed to the rooftops on the merchant street, bathing in the sun, listening to the eclectic cries of the street vendors, and committing them to paper.
list.title: Church-Issue Journal

list.desc:
Rosaria's Vision came to her on a particularly frigid night.
Things were getting desperate for the bandit gang — people were starving and the food supplies were dwindling.
Never able to eat her fill, Rosaria was driven by hunger to flee into the freezing wind rather than continue another second with the hard labor she was forced to endure.
One of the elders of the gang pursued her and brought her back.
He was the very person who had taken her from the village of her birth, and the one who had taught her how to kill.
"Fleeing makes you a traitor, and traitors can only earn their freedom through victory in combat."
The old bandit tossed Rosaria an old dagger.
"Well, come on then! Kill me, and you can leave this place. I'm long in the tooth now, while you've got youth on your side. You can do this, can't ya?"
No one thought that she would be able to kill him — and yet, the old lion would indeed fall by the newborn cub's claws.
Thus did the bandits lose an old member and welcome a new one that very night.
The bandits were reluctant to accept Rosaria at first since she had slain one of their own, but they quickly had a change of heart after seeing the Vision in her hand.
Surely, a Vision wielder had to be far stronger than some old coot who was about to kick the bucket right? And she ate less, to boot... They could save some food this way.
Meanwhile, a question crept into Rosaria's frozen heart:
Did he let me replace him on purpose? ...Could a false father have harbored genuine affection for a child he stole so arbitrarily?
list.title: Vision

list.desc:
Listen disciple, if you've got a problem you can't handle, then I'm the one for the job. But if you're looking for prayer, you'd better find some other Sister
...Huh? You're not a disciple?
list.title: Hello

list.desc: Don't we have a job to do?
list.title: Chat: Boredom

list.desc: Everything is negotiable, except overtime.
list.title: Chat: Overtime

list.desc: Work hard and live each day to the fullest. That is what life in Mondstadt is all about, isn't it?
list.title: Chat: Life in Mondstadt

list.desc: This will slow things down.
list.title: When It Rains

list.desc: ...What a nuisance.
list.title: When Thunder Strikes

list.desc: We should keep moving, but watch your step in the snow.
list.title: When It Snows

list.desc: Blessings from the Anemo Archon Barsibato? Wait... no, it's Bartobas...?
list.title: When the Wind Is Blowing

list.desc: *yawn* Good morning... I've missed morning mass, haven't I? Ugh, it starts too early anyway.
list.title: Good Morning

list.desc: I'd say I sleep even better in the afternoon sun. You should try it sometime.
list.title: Good Afternoon

list.desc: Good evening. Don't expect to see me at prayer tonight... And don't ask why.
list.title: Good Evening

list.desc: Go ahead, take a break. I'll handle things here.
list.title: Good Night

list.desc: Me? I'm just another ordinary person. Church, work... I just do what I have to do.
list.title: About Rosaria: Sister

list.desc: Each of the Sisters is worse than the next. If it's not about prayer, then it's about choir or some other thing I'm supposed to participate in... I'm trying to stay out of sight, so don't you dare tell them you saw me here.
list.title: About Rosaria: Troubles

list.desc: Perhaps a god has the power to protect everyone if they would choose to do so, but that would never happen. Otherwise, people's suffering couldn't ever be taken seriously.
list.title: About Us: Beliefs

list.desc: Pray. Not for the gods, nor the betterment of others... but for yourself.
list.title: About Us: Prayer

list.desc: Don't overdo it. Let me take care of the dirty work.
list.title: About Us: Battle

list.desc: A Vision... Could be proof of strength, or a medal for having survived... who knows? There're two sides to every coin. I won't limit my Vision with ceremonies and definitions. It witnesses me, and I witness it, that's all.
list.title: About the Vision

list.desc: You don't always know why good things happen, or why we should be happy about them. Heh... But if you ever face a problem too big to handle, don't give up hope. You never know, someone may be there to help, even if you can't see them.
list.title: Something to Share

list.desc: I take no interest in plant life and the sort, but the dandelion is an exception. How such a simple flower could turn into such a delectable wine is beyond me. A glass of dandelion wine after work is even better than sleeping in on Sunday.
list.title: Interesting Things

list.desc: Isn't it obvious? There's more than meets the eye to that rich tycoon. He's confident, yet discreet... and even a little bit dangerous.
list.title: About Diluc

list.desc: Wine has its uses... like revealing someone's true colors, for example. Smooth talk is Kaeya's veil, but being me, I can see right through it. Hah, you should see him when he's drunk.
list.title: About Kaeya

list.desc: There's something extremely interesting about this bard... I can't quite put my finger on it. There's something that makes him different from the others in Mondstadt.
list.title: About Venti

list.desc: Barbara is like a thorn in my side, always nagging me about mass and choir practice. I wouldn't be surprised if Sister Victoria specifically asked her to keep an eye on me.
list.title: About Barbara

list.desc: She's not only competent in her own work but also somehow manages to clear up various matters for others... Huh. Now that's a woman who deserves admiration.
list.title: About Jean

list.desc: He's like an oil painting you find hanging on the wall in some ancient hall, profound and mysterious... hard to see through. But what can I say, I find people with stories... interesting.
list.title: About Albedo

list.desc: Although I deplore those who play truant on a job, I respect her punctuality when it comes to closing up for the day.
list.title: About Lisa

list.desc: Trouble, and lots of it. Although, it is sort of a cute kind of trouble...
list.title: About Klee

list.desc: I'm sure Varka means well, but his long-winded conversations get real old real quick. Although, he does really care for those around him, doesn't he?
list.title: About Varka

list.desc: Father? I'm not familiar with the word. You could say that I don't have one — could also say I have many, too. What's it to you?
list.title: About Her Father

list.desc: Let's forgo the formalities. I'm here to finish a job. Just leave the dirty work to me.
list.title: More About Rosaria: I

list.desc: What's weird about a Sister without reverence for the gods? There are hunters who don't eat pork, and fisherman who don't eat fish, aren't there? Just because you do something doesn't mean you love to do it. That's how every job goes.
list.title: More About Rosaria: II

list.desc: This year's Dandelion Wine is sinfully good. Care for a glass?
list.title: More About Rosaria: III

list.desc: Mondstadt is a beast of light, both old and young. Old in the sense that it constantly requires someone's protection, yet too young to ever survive on its own. That's why there's people like me. I care for Mondstadt just as the other Sisters care for the believers, we are all guiding that which we love onward on the path towards freedom. Huh? Why do I call it a beast of light? Because people like myself can only be found in the dark...
list.title: More About Rosaria: IV

list.desc: I sometimes feel that my former selves from years past still exist alongside me, urging me on. I'm sure you know the feeling, too. Even if you decide to venture down a new path, don't just abandon the former you. For that is the foundation upon which you now take footing. Do not fear your past, and do not be scared to come to grips with it.
list.title: More About Rosaria: V

list.desc: There are some troubles that only a stiff drink can take away. That being said, I never get drunk.
list.title: Rosaria's Hobbies

list.desc: Ugh, definitely skipping next month's choir concert, but I bet Sister Victoria will be personally taking roll... What a nuisance.
list.title: Rosaria's Troubles

list.desc: Have you ever tried Beef Bourguignon? Big chunks of meat with the smooth taste of alcohol... Mmm, it's delectable.
list.title: Favorite Food

list.desc: You mean I'm supposed to dip this hash brown in jam? Ugh, this is sacrilege!
list.title: Least Favorite Food

list.desc: Today's your birthday, so if you have any dirty work that needs taking care of, I can give you a hand... Just don't tell anybody, got it?
list.title: Birthday

list.desc: Hmm, just what I needed.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Intro

list.desc: You have a job for me? I've got time.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Building Up

list.desc: Good. Getting stronger means finishing jobs quicker.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Climax

list.desc: I'm no stranger to spilling blood, but never have I possessed such power before. For such blessings, I give you thanks.
list.title: Feelings About Ascension: Conclusion

list.desc: Hyah!
list.title: Elemental Skill: I

list.desc: Judgment!
list.title: Elemental Skill: II

list.desc: You can't run!
list.title: Elemental Skill: III

list.desc: Punishment!
list.title: Elemental Burst: I

list.desc: Shiver!
list.title: Elemental Burst: II

list.desc: Lights out...
list.title: Elemental Burst: III

list.desc: ...Hm, there are a few interesting trinkets here.
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: I

list.desc: I suppose it wasn't too much trouble.
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: II

list.desc: That felt... pretty good.
list.title: Opening Treasure Chest: III

list.desc: Hmph. Things are getting interesting...
list.title: Low HP: I

list.desc: Looks like overtime today.
list.title: Low HP: II

list.desc: So you know your stuff, huh?
list.title: Low HP: III

list.desc: At least... no more... work.
list.title: Fallen: I

list.desc: Maybe this is just... fate's dark design.
list.title: Fallen: II

list.desc: Is this... my final job?
list.title: Fallen: III

list.desc: I see how it is.
list.title: Light Hit Taken: I

list.desc: Ugh, what a nuisance!
list.title: Heavy Hit Taken: I

list.desc: I hear you've got a job for me.
list.title: Joining Party: I

list.desc: Make sure to keep up.
list.title: Joining Party: II

list.desc: Sooner we're done the better.
list.title: Joining Party: III

list.desc: It seems that our tastes are aligned when it comes to food.
list.title: Receiving a Gift: I

list.desc: At least I'll be able to eat my fill with this.
list.title: Receiving a Gift: II

list.desc: Do you really like this food?
list.title: Receiving a Gift: III

list.desc: Let me handle this!
list.title: Ally at Low HP: I

list.desc: Don't try to be a hero!
list.title: Ally at Low HP: II

list.desc:
Looking for me? If you need my help, I've got time.

Ah, so you've also come to wish me a happy birthday? Thank you very much.

Want to go out of town? Okay. It would be nice to spend my day off with you.

Twitter URL: https://twitter.com/GenshinImpact/status/1485462362836459522
list.title: [Birthday Message] SNS & Illustration 1 (2022)

list.desc:
"Shh! Be quiet!"

"Rosaria, Paimon and I have specially prepared a meal of Dandelion Wine stew— eh? Where did Paimon go?"

Twitter URL: https://twitter.com/GenshinImpact/status/1485462368842919937
list.title: [Birthday Message] SNS & Illustration 2 (2022)
